  5. Arthritis & Mobility at home

Arthritis & Mobility at home

Whatever support you need, we find the right caregiver to help you stay independent, comfortable, and supported with mobility and arthritis support.

What is Arthritis & Mobility?

Arthritis & Mobility is tailored support at home from a caregiver matched to you, focused on mobility and arthritis support.

Arthritis & Mobility can:

  • Help you or your loved one stay active and engaged
  • Provide company and someone to socialise with
  • Build confidence in going outside the home
  • Encourage participation in activities inside and outside the home
  • Give families peace of mind with reliable visits

Why is Arthritis & Mobility important?

The right support at home can protect wellbeing and independence. Naptec aims to prevent isolation by providing arthritis & mobility that fits your routine. Many people we support want company, conversation, and practical help that keeps life enjoyable at home.

How can arthritis & mobility maintain my quality of life?

Home visits from Naptec mean you and your loved ones have peace of mind knowing you have the company and support of a friendly, trusted caregiver. We match you with someone who shares your interests and can accompany you in whatever you enjoy, so if your needs change over time, there is already someone you know and trust.

How can we help?

We have helped thousands of families to stay safe, comfortable and happy at home. Whatever situation you are facing, Naptec is here to help.

Are you in need of a little guidance right away?

Other non-care-related enquiries
Enquire now

What we do to care for your loved ones

We offer two types of home care: hourly care, where we visit at set times, or live-in care, where a caregiver resides in the home. Each care package is made up of a unique mix of services to meet your needs.

Companionship care

We carefully match caregivers with clients to ensure a meaningful bond is created.

Home help & meal prep

Keeping the home clean, safe, and nourishing with home-cooked meals.

Personal care

Assistance with bathing, dressing, and personal hygiene, always with dignity.

Mobility support

Helping your loved one move around their home safely, including transfers.

Health appointment management

Support to attend important health appointments.

Community engagement

Enabling your loved one to continue doing the things they enjoy.

Transportation

Assistance getting from A to B for visits, errands, and outings.

Medication management

Ensuring medicines are taken correctly and on time.

Enquire now

Get in touch today to see how we can help

Get in touch

Confused about home care? We can help.

We know you want the best for your loved one. When it comes to arranging home care, we have made it easy with personalised, attentive care that adapts as your needs change.

From warm and friendly companionship to specialised, practical care that puts their needs and preferences first, we are changing the way people think about home care.

Discover more

FAQs

  • Arthritis & Mobility focuses on social needs and daily support at home, whereas personal care includes help with bathing, dressing, and other intimate care tasks.

  • It is often most beneficial when someone would like more social interaction, practical help at home, or reassurance for family members who cannot visit as often as they would like.

  • Visit frequency depends on what you want and need. We work with you to agree a bespoke plan of care and support, from a few hours a week to several visits a day.
